body: ABSOLUTE rule (PO 2026-06-28): never author HELIX design/requirements/features top-down without first inventorying existing harness assets (FR-L1-01..51 / BR / NFR / modes / gates / commands / skills) at that granularity and cross-mapping reuse+GAP. No exceptions. Mechanism=harness wins, features conform.

Before any web search, verify the current date; prioritize the latest 2025-2026 sources and never use stale info as-is (PO feedback). Verify-don't-blindly-adopt: check external findings fit HELIX before incorporating.

HELIX rebuild on HELIX harness at ~/HELIX-HARNESS. Done: P2/P7 orchestration+memory (PLAN-L7-175/176, 9 oracles green), L0 charter confirmed, L1 solo conversion in progress (PLAN-L1-06: concept+business+nfr solo-reframed, pillar-requirements.md drafts P0-P9->HBR/HNFR grounded in FR-L1-01..51). Detail lives in committed PLANs/docs/git, not here.

bun build --compile gotcha: loaders that fall back to an import.meta-derived default ROOT (e.g. loadFrDocs() with no arg) resolve to /$bunfs in the compiled binary -> ENOENT, while source+vitest see the real repo and pass. Symptom: 'bun run src/cli.ts doctor' green but dist/helix doctor red. Fix: thread repoRoot into every loader; guard with a smoke test that runs the COMPILED dist/helix doctor (vitest cannot catch this class). Resolved commit 9f76cb7.

Rename policy (PO 2026-06-28): machine identifiers (CLI helix, .helix/ dir, area=helix, rule-drift markers) stay FROZEN until L1 Forward completes, then renamed to HELIX atomically in ONE dedicated migration PLAN (all gates green as the boundary condition). Do NOT drip-rename during feature work — partial rename reddens rule-drift and breaks hooks/state/DB. Prose/product name = HELIX migrates continuously now. Blast radius: 55 src files/222 hits, 56 test files, 451 docs, .helix/ physical dir + harness.db paths.

Working-style feedback (PO 2026-06-28, sharp): STOP the ask-and-defer pattern. Asking 'shall I proceed / when' and then not doing it is the core problem — deferred items rot and never happen. Fixes: (1) when the user has already said proceed, ACT — do not re-ask. (2) Anything deferred to 'later' must become a mechanically-tracked artifact (draft PLAN + blocks/trigger + harness memory surface), never a vague verbal 'later'. Bias to action over questions.

GAP found (PO flagged 2026-06-28): P2 loop engine (tick/loop-runner, PLAN-L7-175/176, 9 oracles green) is CONTRACT-ONLY. tick's runWorker/runVerifier have ZERO production wiring to real Codex/Claude (test injection only), and there is NO 'helix loop' entrypoint. So the autonomous Claude<->Codex loop does NOT actually run — '9 oracles green' verified LOGIC, not real orchestration ('実装したつもり' gap). Working paths that DO invoke Codex: 'helix codex --execute' (one-shot) and 'helix team run --execute'. Fix = runtime bridge add-impl: real nodeTickDeps (runWorker->helix codex --execute, runVerifier->opposite runtime) + 'helix loop run --plan' entrypoint, dogfooded via Codex worker. Lesson: an oracle on a pure function does not prove the runtime is wired — substance gate should require an end-to-end dispatch test.

Old HELIX source repo = git@github.com:RetryYN/ai-dev-kit-vscode.git (uninstalled old core, canonical SOURCE of individual features). Standing rule (PO 2026-06-28, in CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md): at every layer's design/curation, ALWAYS check this repo for portable features (command/skill/subagent/detector/advisor roles e.g. TL advisor) — inventory-first absolute rule includes old HELIX. But never exceed precedence/ADR-001: read-only reference, concepts only, TS/Bun reimplement (no Python/old runtime), NO bulk import, curate at matching granularity, harden (rename/de-legacy/capability-class) subordinate to the harness mechanism.

Background delegation notify: nohup '... &' inside a Bash call is FIRE-AND-FORGET — the harness does NOT track it and will NOT re-invoke on exit (claimed 'I'll be notified' but wouldn't be; PO caught it 2026-06-28). For trackable completion use the Bash tool's run_in_background:true (harness-tracked, auto-notifies on exit), OR poll explicitly with pgrep/log tail. Never promise a completion callback for a nohup job. Codex --execute finished while I wrongly waited on a non-existent notification.

HELIX on HELIX harness at ~/HELIX-HARNESS. DONE: L0 charter confirmed; P2/P7 orchestration+memory+runtime-bridge (PLAN-L7-175/176/177, loop actually dispatches real Codex/Claude via 'helix loop run', worker≠verifier, U-ORCH/U-MEM/BRIDGE green); L1 solo-conversion Step 1-5 complete & committed (5 sub-docs + governance + pillar HBR/HNFR + OT pairs + §2.5 external-research delta + Codex cross-review fixes). PENDING: Step 6 = PO re-freeze (human gate) → then AI flips L1 draft→confirmed. NEXT (Codex handoff, see docs/handover/session-handover-2026-06-28.md + CURRENT.json): L3 descent HBR/HNFR (priority P6/P8), L3 verify §2.5 delta, P2/P7 residual GAPs, P9 observability carry, roster/advisor curation from old HELIX repo.

HELIX on HELIX harness at ~/HELIX-HARNESS. DONE: L0 charter confirmed; P2/P7 orchestration+memory+runtime-bridge green; PLAN-L1-06 HELIX solo conversion closed, committed, and pushed (b742b7e). L1 confirmed scope now includes Codex runtime parity plus final distribution/full setup: non-destructive setup, existing-project onboarding/import report, and tag-bump version-up with migration/rollback plan. NEXT: L3 descent should prioritize P6/P8, expand distribution/full-setup into FR+AC, verify external delta, and carry P2/P7 residual GAPs.

RESOLVED (2026-07-04 検証): 2026-06-28 に PO が指摘した P2 loop engine の contract-only gap は PLAN-L7-177 (confirmed, 2026-07-01) で解消済み。実配線: src/orchestration/loop-bridge.ts nodeTickDeps() が spawnSync で実 Codex/Claude adapter を起動 (worker->反対 provider verifier)、helix loop run --plan entrypoint あり (src/cli.ts:1268)。E2E dispatch test = U-ORCH-BRIDGE-02 (tests/orchestration/loop-bridge.test.ts、fake provider で実 spawn 実証)。残 carry: loop_iterations->harness.db projection 未実装 / doctor verifier-provider-mismatch gate 未実装 (親: PLAN-L7-177 §4 carry)、HBR-P1 continuous-run heartbeat 未実装 (PLAN-L7-214:101 carry)。教訓 (oracle on pure function ≠ runtime wired、substance gate は E2E dispatch test を要求) は引き続き有効。

HELIX on HELIX harness at ~/HELIX-HARNESS. DONE (2026-07-06): L0 charter confirmed / L1 solo+Codex parity 済に加え、DISCOVERY-11 L1⟷L2 要件抽出サイクルが S4 confirmed (観点表8観点、PM-06 で実証、REVERSE-329 fullback 済)。機械化一式 confirmed: l1-l2-consistency doctor gate (PLAN-L7-330) / L1⟷L2 gap-check CLI (L7-333, Codex) / reverse 空fullback+seed変換 fail-close (L7-331) / 起票完全性 plan lint + poc/reverse/impl templates (L7-332)。PLAN-L3-07 要件拘束は Step1 構造品質gate・Step2前半・Step5 glossary 済。NEXT: L3-07 Step2後半 (.helix/config schema+threshold移設) / Step3 NFRグレード表 / Step4 retention L3起草 / Step6 refactor actionable 化、L7-332 Step3 helix plan scaffold CLI。PO pending 一括判断: S4 decide ×2 (DISCOVERY-07/10)、action-binding approval ×3 (DISCOVERY-10 / L7-146 / M-02 rename)。
